scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build:client: npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.build:server: npm install --prefix server --include=dev && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
